title: Production Planning (PP) Overview
learning_objectives: Understand the purpose of SAP Production Planning.
Learn how SAP PP supports manufacturing operations.
Understand the complete production planning cycle.
Identify the master data required in SAP PP.
Understand how SAP PP integrates with other SAP modules.

introduction.title: What is SAP Production Planning?
introduction.content: SAP Production Planning (PP) is the SAP module used to plan, schedule, execute and monitor manufacturing activities. It helps organizations ensure that the right products are manufactured in the right quantity, at the right time, while efficiently utilizing materials, machines and manpower.

business_purpose.title: Why is SAP PP Used?
business_purpose.content: Production Planning enables manufacturing companies to convert customer demand into production activities. It ensures material availability, efficient resource utilization, timely production and seamless integration with procurement, inventory, quality and finance.

integration.purpose: Stores raw materials and finished goods.

pp_master_data.name: Material Master
pp_master_data.purpose: Stores information about raw materials, semi-finished and finished products.

pp_master_data.name: Bill of Material (BOM)
pp_master_data.purpose: Defines the list of components required to manufacture a product.

pp_master_data.name: Work Center
pp_master_data.purpose: Represents machines, equipment or production resources.

pp_master_data.name: Routing
pp_master_data.purpose: Defines the sequence of manufacturing operations.

pp_master_data.name: Production Version
pp_master_data.purpose: Links BOM and Routing for production execution.

business_example.title: Example
business_example.content: A customer places an order for stainless steel coils. SAP PP calculates the material requirement through MRP, creates production orders, allocates work centers, schedules operations, confirms production completion and updates inventory after Goods Receipt.

best_practices: Coordinate with MM and QM teams.
